metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4874
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3b: Immunoelectron microscopic detection of synaptophysin and G protein α-subunits in parallel fiber synapses of the rat cerebellum. Immunogold signals for Gαo2 (gene GNAO1, isoform Gαo2) and Gαq/11 concentrate in the vesicle cluster of the presynaptic terminals. Individual immunogold-labeled SSVs are indicated by arrowheads.. Experimental description: Figure 3: "Immunoelectron microscopic detection of synaptophysin and G protein α-subunits in parallel fiber synapses of the rat cerebellum."

antibody:
"Mouse monoclonal antibodies against synaptobrevin II (clone 69.1) (Edelmann et al., 1995) and against Gαo2 (clone 101.1) and rabbit polyclonal antisera against synaptophysin (G96; Jahn et al., 1985) and the vesicular GABA transporter VGAT (Takamori et al., 2000b) were kindly provided by R. Jahn (MPI für Biophysikalische Chemie, Göttingen, Germany)"

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
